growth_records.strain: DAD (model iOB649), in mixed anaerobic enrichment subculture SC05-UT replicate R2
growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined mineral medium (ref 15), DCM-fed (Mode 3 mineralization)

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.037 mmol over 14 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.037 mmol DCM degraded, days 12-26

yields.copies_yield: 6.8 x 10^12 16S rRNA copies per eeq donor

growth_records.cite: Bulka et al. Modeling reveals a metabolic basis of competition among dichloromethane-degrading Dehalobacter strains. mSystems (2025). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00847-25. [PMC12542780]
growth_records.snippet: in one replicate (R2), strain DAD increased almost 100-fold ... DAD 16S rRNA copies/mL 1.58 x 10^5 (initial) to 1.02 x 10^7 (final), days 12-26, DCM degraded 0.037 mmol (Table 1).
growth_records.notes: Growth Mode 3 (DCM/H+ mineralization), SC05-UT R2, days 12-26 (14 d). Strain DAD 16S copies/mL: 1.58e5 -> 1.02e7 (~65-fold). mu = ln(1.02e7/1.58e5)/14 = ln(64.56)/14 = 4.16752/14 = 0.297680 /day = 0.012403 /h. Doubling time = ln2/0.012403 = 55.88 h (2.33 d). DCM uptake = 0.037 mmol/14 d = 0.002643 mmol/day/bottle. Per-bottle totals; single replicate, mixed community -> low confidence. Yields (Table 1): 6.8e12 16S copies and 2.30e12 cells per eeq donor.

growth_records.strain: DAD (model iOB649), in mixed anaerobic enrichment subculture DCME
growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined mineral medium (ref 15), amended with CF + H2 (Mode 1 CF dechlorination)

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.009 mmol over 7 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.009 mmol CF degraded, days 5-12

up.units: electron donor in Mode 1; specific rate not reported

sec.units: CF reduced to DCM (Mode 1); no net DCM degraded in this interval

yields.copies_yield: (1.3 +/- 0.37) x 10^13 16S rRNA copies per eeq donor

growth_records.cite: Bulka et al. Modeling reveals a metabolic basis of competition among dichloromethane-degrading Dehalobacter strains. mSystems (2025). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00847-25. [PMC12542780]
growth_records.snippet: In the DCME sub-transfers, Dehalobacter strain DAD more than doubled when CF was dechlorinated ... DAD 16S rRNA copies/mL 1.67 x 10^6 (initial) to 4.04 x 10^6 (final), days 5-12, CF degraded 0.009 mmol (Table 1, Mode 1).
growth_records.notes: Growth Mode 1 (H2/CF, CF dechlorination), DCME, days 5-12 (7 d per Table 1; main text says days 7-12). Strain DAD 16S copies/mL: 1.67e6 -> 4.04e6. mu = ln(4.04e6/1.67e6)/7 = ln(2.4192)/7 = 0.883367/7 = 0.126195 /day = 0.005258 /h. Doubling time = ln2/0.005258 = 131.8 h (5.49 d). CF uptake = 0.009 mmol/7 d = 0.001286 mmol/day/bottle. Per-bottle totals; mixed community -> low confidence. Yields (Table 1): (1.3+/-0.37)e13 16S copies and (4.4+/-1.2)e12 cells per eeq donor. Confirms DAD can dechlorinate CF with H2 (Mode 1).

growth_records.strain: DAD (model iOB649), in mixed anaerobic enrichment subculture DCME
growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined mineral medium (ref 15), DCM-fed (Mode 3 mineralization)

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.015 mmol over 8 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.015 mmol DCM degraded, days 18-26

yields.copies_yield: 2.92 x 10^10 16S rRNA copies per eeq donor

growth_records.cite: Bulka et al. Modeling reveals a metabolic basis of competition among dichloromethane-degrading Dehalobacter strains. mSystems (2025). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00847-25. [PMC12542780]
growth_records.snippet: DCM mineralization yielded fewer strain DAD cells in the DCME replicates ... DAD 16S rRNA copies/mL 8.60 x 10^6 (initial) to 9.79 x 10^6 (final), days 18-26, DCM degraded 0.015 mmol (Table 1, Mode 3).
growth_records.notes: Growth Mode 3 (DCM/H+ mineralization), DCME, days 18-26 (8 d). Strain DAD 16S copies/mL: 8.60e6 -> 9.79e6. mu = ln(9.79e6/8.60e6)/8 = ln(1.1384)/8 = 0.129624/8 = 0.016203 /day = 0.000675 /h. Doubling time = ln2/0.000675 = 1026.6 h (42.8 d). DCM uptake = 0.015 mmol/8 d = 0.001875 mmol/day/bottle. Very low yield (9.7e9 cells/eeq donor), lower than previously reported for DCM mineralization. Per-bottle totals; mixed community -> low confidence.
